events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: PVC conduit joints with wrong glue/no primer. Work is in-progress. This is a sequence/procedure violation. PVC conduit requires proper primer and cement per NEC Art. 352 and manufacturer instructions. Wrong glue/no primer = non-compliant, installed-defective joints.

Decision: fail (non-compliant).
Risk: medium to high - improper joints can fail, allow water ingress, compromise system. I'll say high.
Work stage: in-progress.
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.
Percent complete: estimate maybe 40.
Value: 0.
Confidence: 0.9.
Findings: PVC joints made with wrong glue and no primer.
Actions: stop work, cut out and replace defective joints, retrain crew, use correct primer/cement per manufacturer and NEC.
References: NEC Art. 352, 344.
